title: Nullity of contracts
doc_html:
CHAPTER 11.  NULLITY

Art. 2029.  Nullity of contracts

A contract is null when the requirements for its formation have not been met.

Acts 1984, No. 331, §1, eff. Jan. 1, 1985.
doc_text:
CHAPTER 11.  NULLITY
Art. 2029.  Nullity of contracts
A contract is null when the requirements for its formation have not been met.
Acts 1984, No. 331, §1, eff. Jan. 1, 1985.
